pageSubtitle: Add PromptPay accounts and choose the active one for QR payments.
createFirstHint: Create at least one account before accepting orders.
invalidPhone: Enter a 10-digit Thai mobile number starting with 0
invalidBillPayment: Biller ID and Reference 1 are required
qrDataHint: Scan your existing Bill Payment QR with any QR scanner app, then paste the text here.
qrParseError: Could not parse QR data. Make sure you pasted the full text.
qrParseNoTag30: This doesn't look like a Bill Payment QR. Try a different QR code.
